summary: Resend Email Integration - Backend testing completed. 16/16 tests passed. Email notifications are properly triggered for all scenarios. System gracefully handles missing RESEND_API_KEY by logging warnings and continuing operation.

tests: Function uses Resend API when RESEND_API_KEY is configured
Function logs WARNING when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
Function returns False gracefully when API key missing
Function catches exceptions and logs errors without breaking flow
Function supports attachments (base64 encoded)
Generates professional HTML email template
Includes StickPro branding header with gradient
Has responsive design with viewport meta tag
Uses table-based layout for email client compatibility
Includes customizable title, content, and footer
POST /api/members/{id}/send-activation-reminder triggers email
Email subject: 'Ativa a tua conta StickPro'
Email content includes activation instructions
Verified in logs: [EMAIL SKIPPED] when no API key
POST /api/payments/custom triggers email to player
Email subject: 'Novo Pagamento: {title}'
Email content includes payment details (amount, due date)
Verified in logs: [EMAIL SKIPPED] when no API key
PUT /api/payments/{type}/{id}/mark-paid triggers confirmation email
Email subject: 'Pagamento Confirmado: {description}'
Email content includes confirmation details
Verified in logs: [EMAIL SKIPPED] when no API key
POST /api/unavailabilities triggers email to team coaches
Email subject: 'Indisponibilidade: {player_name}'
Email content includes period and reason
Multiple coaches notified (verified in logs)
POST /api/events/check-reminders triggers reminder emails
Email subject: '⚠️ Lembrete: {event_title} sem convocatória'
Email sent to coaches when event has no convocation 4h before
Reminder recorded in database to prevent duplicates
System works without RESEND_API_KEY configured
All endpoints continue to function normally
Email errors are caught and logged without breaking flow
Payments page fully functional

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ send_email_notification correctly uses asyncio.to_thread for non-blocking Resend API calls
✓ Proper error handling with try/except that logs but doesn't raise
✓ All email triggers wrapped in try/except blocks
✓ RESEND_API_KEY and SENDER_EMAIL read from environment variables
✓ Default sender 'onboarding@resend.dev' used when SENDER_EMAIL not set
seed_data_creation: Test payments and members created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Resend email integration fully tested. RESEND_API_KEY is NOT configured in backend/.env (MOCKED). When user adds RESEND_API_KEY, real emails will be sent via Resend API. Current behavior: emails are logged with [EMAIL SKIPPED] warning. Email triggers verified: account activation, new payment, payment confirmation, unavailability notification to coaches, event reminder without convocation. All operations continue successfully even without email sending.
mocked_api_note: RESEND_API_KEY not configured - emails are MOCKED (logged but not sent). Real email sending will work when user adds their Resend API key to backend/.env
